# Data Source (postgresql_schemas)

Lists PostgreSQL schemas with optional filtering by name patterns.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all user schemas
data "postgresql_schemas" "user_schemas" {
  include_system_schemas = false
}

output "schema_names" {
  value = [for s in data.postgresql_schemas.user_schemas.schemas : s.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `database` (String) The database to list schemas from. Uses the provider default if not set.
- `include_system_schemas` (Boolean) Whether to include system schemas (pg_* and information_schema). Default: false.
- `like_pattern` (String) A SQL LIKE pattern to filter schema names.
- `not_like_pattern` (String) A SQL NOT LIKE pattern to exclude schema names.

### Read-Only

- `schemas` (Attributes List) List of schemas. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schemas))

<a id="nestedatt--schemas"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schemas`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The name of the schema.
- `owner` (String) The owner of the schema.
